Blog & Technical Insights

SOLID Principles: Design Excellence

Master the SOLID principles for writing maintainable, scalable code. Learn each principle with real-world Go examples.

Design Patterns Go

OOP in Go: Pragmatic Design

Go doesn't have classes, but it has composition, interfaces, and methods. Learn practical OOP patterns in Go.

Go OOP

Go Buffered Channels: Complete Guide

Master Go's buffered channels - from basics to advanced patterns like worker pools and fan-out/fan-in.

Go Concurrency

DAG Theory & Data Pipelines

Understanding directed acyclic graphs and how they power data orchestration tools like Apache Airflow.

Data Engineering Airflow

Designing for Scalability: HLD Guide

A comprehensive guide to building scalable systems - from stateless services to database sharding and caching strategies.
